summary: Customer Portal Feature Testing - Backend APIs (17/17 PASSED), Frontend UI (ALL PASSED). Fixed BUG in Items GET and PUT endpoints - role-based pricing fields were not being returned in the response. All customer portal pages, admin management pages, and role-based pricing in Items form verified working.

fixed.issue: Role-based pricing fields (rate_doctors, rate_medicals, rate_agencies, etc.) not returned in response
fixed.fix_applied: Added role-based pricing fields to ItemResponse in get_item endpoint

fixed.issue: Role-based pricing fields not returned in response after update
fixed.fix_applied: Added role-based pricing fields to ItemResponse in update_item endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp OTP Integration: Uses external BotMasterSender API - OTP is sent but cannot verify delivery in testing. API returns success indicating OTP was queued.
Customer Registration Flow: 3-step process (Phone→OTP→Details) working correctly via UI and API
Role-based Pricing: Properly stored in MongoDB and returned via API after fix
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed GET /api/items/{item_id} to return role-based pricing fields (lines 2877-2904)
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed PUT /api/items/{item_id} to return role-based pricing fields (lines 2949-2976)
/app/backend/tests/test_customer_portal.py - Created comprehensive test suite for customer portal APIs
seed_data_creation: TEST_Portal_Item created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Portal feature fully tested. Key flows: 1) /customer/register - 3-step registration with OTP verification, 2) /customer/login - phone+password login, 3) /customers - admin customer management with approve/reject, 4) /support - admin support tickets management, 5) /items - role-based pricing fields (Doctor/Medical/Agency) in item form. WhatsApp OTP uses external API - cannot verify actual delivery. All frontend pages load correctly with proper forms and filters.

customer_send_otp.details: OTP sent successfully via WhatsApp API

admin_customers_list.details: Returns portal customers list with filters (status, role, search)

items_role_pricing_get.details: Returns item with role-based pricing fields after bug fix

items_role_pricing_update.details: Updates and returns item with role-based pricing fields after bug fix

states_api.details: Returns Indian states for registration form

customer_register_ui.details: 3-step form with phone, OTP, and details steps working correctly

customer_login_ui.details: Login form with phone and password, validation errors shown correctly

admin_customers_ui.details: Customer registrations page with stats, search, filters, and empty state

admin_support_ui.details: Support tickets page with stats, search, filters, and empty state
